description_long: This is a modern military-style helicopter with a streamlined, angular fuselage and a prominent main rotor with four long, straight blades. The helicopter features a tail boom with a horizontal stabilizer and a tail rotor mounted on the left side, as well as robust landing gear with two skids. The cockpit is located at the front, with multiple angular windows providing visibility for the crew. The exterior is finished in a matte dark gray color, with various surface details such as antennas, sensors, and weapon mounts visible along the body. The overall design suggests a focus on tactical operations and urban maneuverability.
description: A matte dark gray, military-style helicopter with four main rotor blades, a side-mounted tail rotor, and angular cockpit windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four main rotor blades, angular cockpit, and landing skids beneath the fuselage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, side-mounted tail rotor, and detailed landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, horizontal stabilizer, and the tail rotor's position on the left.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit profile, main rotor, and the full length of the helicopter's body.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades, likely made of composite material, colored black with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Tail rotor with four short blades, mounted vertically on the left side of the tail boom, colored black with no visible markings.
attribute_landing_skids: Two robust, straight landing skids made of metal, colored dark gray, with visible crossbars and support struts.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Multiple angular cockpit windows, including a large front window and smaller side panels, framed in black, with a slight tint.
